design_intent: Warm Modern Farmhouse living room with shiplap, natural wood, cozy black accents, relaxed tailored upholstery, soft texture, and lived-in comfort in a bright suburban setting.

selected_pieces.product_name: Farmhouse Beige Linen-like Sofa with Rolled Arm and Nailhead Trim, 3-Seater Couch for Living Room
selected_pieces.placement_note: Centered on the main shiplap wall, floated slightly off the wall with two oatmeal pillows and one black lumbar pillow to introduce the room’s accent color.

selected_pieces.product_name: Wooden Round Pedestal Coffee Table - Natural
selected_pieces.placement_note: Placed directly in front of the sofa, centered on the rug, with enough clearance for easy circulation and a simple bowl or stack of books on top.

selected_pieces.product_name: VINGLI TV Stands & Entertainment Centers For Tvs Up To 70'' Farmhouse with 18'' Fireplace
selected_pieces.placement_note: Mounted on the opposite wall as the media focal point, aligned low and centered so the fireplace glow anchors the seating area without overpowering the farmhouse palette.

selected_pieces.product_name: 7'X10' Vintage Tufted Distressed Area Rug Tan - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Laid under the full seating arrangement, with the front legs of the sofa resting on it to ground the room in a warm, softly aged texture.

selected_pieces.product_name: Brighton Windowpane Plaid Lined Room Darkening Single Window Curtain Panel - 52" x 108" - Gray - Elrene Home Fashions
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hung floor-to-ceiling at the main windows to add soft vertical lines, keep the room bright, and subtly reinforce the farmhouse pattern language.

selected_pieces.product_name: 2pk Square Cotton Woven Stripe Throw Pillows Neutral/Ivory - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Layered at each end of the sofa to soften the silhouette and add a crisp woven texture that echoes the shiplap and wood tones.

selected_pieces.product_name: LuxenHome 16" Floor Vase, Cement White Rustic Vases for Flowers, Large Vases for Decor Living Room, Decorative Flower Vase for Home Decor
selected_pieces.placement_note: Styled beside the fireplace media console on the floor or a low corner ledge, filled with airy stems for height and a quiet rustic note.
